layers.text: My go-to gels for marathon training and race day
These are the only gels I buy! I love that they have so few ingredients, taste good and provide effective energy. They're also a good size/shape for sneaking into small pockets. Totally recommend!
Love the original honey pack! Great taste! Perfect amount! Easy to open while running or competing! Can't wait to try some of the others!
Amazing gels. Great taste, easy to digest, no G.I. issues whatsoever. I use them for my runs and also for hockey! Makes a big difference for my energy levels. 10/10 would recommend.
The consistencies of these honey gels are great and they sit really well in the stomach.
